summary: Iteration 30: Dynamic README module system testing complete. Backend 10/10 PASSED. Frontend Help tab and all other tabs working correctly. Minor issue: 'Ask help model' button returns 422 error in fresh browser sessions due to welcome instance timing.

integration_issues.issue: 422 error when clicking 'Ask help model' in fresh browser sessions. The welcome instance may not be fully provisioned or the instance_id isn't being passed correctly. Backend works correctly when tested directly via curl.
integration_issues.note: This appears to be a timing/state issue. The welcome instance creation on first visit may be failing silently or the instance_id isn't available when the button is clicked.

issues: HTML nesting warning: button inside button (pre-existing issue, not related to this feature)

action_items: Investigate why 'Ask help model' returns 422 in browser - likely welcome instance not being created or instance_id not available
Add better error handling/feedback when welcome instance isn't ready
Consider adding a loading state or retry logic for the Ask button when welcome instance is provisioning
critical_code_review_comments: The welcome instance creation in AimmhHubPage.jsx (lines 250-275) silently catches errors - consider adding user feedback when instance creation fails
HelpReadmePanel.jsx should verify welcomeInstance.instance_id exists before enabling the Ask button

success_rate.frontend: 90% - All tabs working, Help tab features work except Ask button in fresh sessions

test_credentials.note: Guest flow used with X-Guest-Id header for testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic README module system is implemented. Backend endpoints /api/v1/readme/registry and /api/v1/readme/registry/sync work correctly. Help tab replaces Claude.md tab. All 7 hub tabs (Help, Registry, Instances, Batch Runs, Roleplay Runs, Chat, Synthesis) load correctly. The 'Ask help model' button has a timing issue with welcome instance provisioning.

backend_readme_registry.details: GET /api/v1/readme/registry returns 177 modules with metrics, docs, and compliance info

backend_readme_registry_sync.details: POST /api/v1/readme/registry/sync runs marker sync and returns refreshed registry

backend_marker_compliance.details: max_code_rule_ok is coherent (<=400 lines), violations list matches modules with issues

frontend_help_tab_exists.details: Help tab exists in navigation, replaces prior Claude.md tab

frontend_help_panel_components.details: All components present: question input, refresh registry button, sync markers button, ask button, preview panel, response panel

frontend_refresh_registry.details: Clicking 'Refresh registry' populates README preview with module data

frontend_ask_help_model.details: Button exists and is clickable, but returns 422 error in fresh browser sessions due to welcome instance timing

frontend_no_regressions.details: All 7 hub tabs (Help, Registry, Instances, Batch Runs, Roleplay Runs, Chat, Synthesis) load correctly

mocked_apis.details: Stripe test-mode behavior (not in scope for this test)

notes: Backend README registry endpoints fully functional
Frontend Help tab correctly replaces Claude.md tab
All hub tabs load without compile/runtime regressions
Welcome instance provisioning has timing issue affecting Ask help model button
Direct API testing confirms chat prompt flow works when instance exists
